name: Plan and Render Separation
objective: Separate planning, script, storyboard, asset needs, provider choice, customer approval, rendering, and acceptance for future media workflows.
non_goals: No provider call, upload, model download, media generation, voice synthesis, image synthesis, rendering, or external publish.
inputs: Future customer-approved brief, factual source list, audience, style, and delivery constraints.
outputs: Future script, storyboard, asset plan, provider-neutral handoff, and acceptance checklist.

read: Future customer-approved brief and factual source list

excluded_patterns: PPTX and media renderer execution remain separate-skill concerns.
known_gaps: The proposal is planning-only and does not create or validate a rendered artifact.
